name: io.github.DmitriyGolub/threejs-devtools
description: Inspect and edit Three.js scenes, materials, shaders, lights in real time from any AI agent
title: Three.js DevTools MCP

environmentVariables.description: Dev server port to proxy (auto-detected from package.json if not set)
environmentVariables.name: DEV_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'none' to disable auto-opening browser
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' for headless browser mode (CI)
environmentVariables.name: HEADLESS
